zh.lifeSummary: Catherine Barrett於大約1505年出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾可利斯丘其。她於1520年與Robert White在英國英格蘭哈普爾可利斯丘其結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1550年在英國哈普爾可利斯丘其享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Catherine Barrett于大约1505年出生在英国英格兰哈普爾可利斯丘其。她于1520年与Robert White在英国英格兰哈普爾可利斯丘其结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1550年在英国哈普爾可利斯丘其享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Barrett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): probably a nickname for a quarrelsome person, from Old French barat, Middle English bar(r)at, bar(r)et(te) ‘trouble, distress’, later ‘deception, fraud; contention, strife’. Through Norman settlement it also became common in Ireland, where it was Gaelicized as Baróid (Munster) and Baréid (Connacht).

variants.name: Barret
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Matthieu, Mirlande, Philippe.

French: derivative of the topographic name   Barre   1 ‘barrier’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 3 below) is also found in Haiti.

variants.name: Baratta
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Carmine, Pasquale, Alfonse, Antonio, Carmela, Guido, Salvatore, Vincenzo.
Italian: occupational name for a market trader, especially in northern Italy, from baratta ‘exchange, sale, buying and selling’, a derivative of barattare ‘to barter’. See also Barrett .

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: Catherine Barrett was born about 1505, in Christchurch, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Robert White in 1520, in Christchurch, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 8 daughters. She died in 1550, in Christchurch, Hampshire, England, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Catherine Barrett est née environ 1505, à Christchurch, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Robert White en 1520, à Christchurch, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée en 1550, à Christchurch, Hampshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Catherine Barrett wurde um 1505 in Christchurch, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat 1520 in Christchurch, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom Robert White geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb 1550 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Christchurch, Hampshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Catherine Barrett è nata il circa 1505 nel Christchurch, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Robert White nel 1520, nel Christchurch, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel 1550, nel Christchurch, Hampshire, England, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Barrettは約1505年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアチリストチャーチで生まれた。1520年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアチリストチャーチでRobert Whiteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1550年にイギリスハンプシュアイアチリストチャーチで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Barrett(은)는 대략 1505년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 크리스트c후르치에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1520년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 크리스트c후르치에서 Robert White(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1550년 영국 함프실르 크리스트c후르치에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Catherine Barrett родилась около 1505 г. в местности крисчурч, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert White в 1520 г. в местности крисчурч, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 8 дочерей. Она умерла в 1550 г. в местности крисчурч, хампшир, Англия в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Catherine Barrett nació aproximadamente 1505, en Christchurch, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Robert White en 1520, en Christchurch, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en 1550, en Christchurch, Hampshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años.
